news-global-econ.description:

news-global-soc.title: Finding the sleep 'sweet spot' could help you live longer, study suggests
news-global-soc.description: A new study in Nature reveals that people who sleep too little or too long show signs of accelerated biological aging and higher disease risk.

news-global-soc.title: Robot's lifeless corpse hauled off stage after fall during disastrous Michael Jackson impression
news-global-soc.description: A humanoid robot dancing to Michael Jackson's "Billie Jean" at a store in Shenzhen, China, wipes out on stage in a hilariously viral video clip.

news-global-soc.title: Wall Street banks helped Chinese military-linked firm raise billions despite red flags, lawmakers find
